data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for scoped state.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scoped state, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or details regarding the existence or structure of the required extension-owned state documents. While the linked use case mentions the need for scoped state, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that these documents are being created or validated. This leads to a conclusion that the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of extension-owned state documents with namespace and key.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
